texto: I don't appreciate people when they judge someone with their appearance but not their feelings. It feels like they want to rule that person for rest of their life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kiran Arshad: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't appreciate people when they judge someone with their appearance but not their feelings. I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, life-lesson, appreciate pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
